use_cases: Display a loading state while fetching data from an API
Indicate processing during form submission or button actions
Show pending content while a page or component loads
Visual feedback during async operations like file uploads
Decorative loading animation for dashboards and app shells
ai_summary: A kinetic dots loader featuring four bouncing dots with physics-based animations including gravity bounce, rubber morph effects, floor ripple shockwaves, and reflective shadows. The dots use a cyan-to-blue gradient with glowing effects and staggered timing for rhythmic motion. Designed as a lightweight, visually engaging loading indicator for modern web applications.
